analysis.consistency: High. The description is internally consistent regarding the mechanics of the smoke cloud generation, expansion, persistence, and dispersal.
analysis.quality: Good. The description is clear, detailed, and provides all necessary mechanical rules for its use (action to open/close, radius effects over time, dispersal conditions).

mechanics.action_cost: Action to open, Action to close (using command word).
mechanics.effect: Creates a heavily obscured 60-foot radius cloud upon opening.
mechanics.scaling: Cloud radius increases by 10 feet per minute until reaching a maximum of 120 feet.
mechanics.persistence: As long as the bottle is open. If closed, it disperses after 10 minutes.
dispersal_conditions: Moderate wind (11-20 mph): disperses after 1 minute.
Strong wind (21+ mph): disperses after 1 round.

analysis.notes: The item description is comprehensive for game mechanics. The time element (per minute increase) needs careful tracking, but the rules are explicitly defined.
